---
title: "Margaret Helen Awdry"
---

## Margaret Helen Awdry

**Dates:** (May 1852-12 June 1939)

**Maiden name:** (Moberly)

### Description

goddaughter of CMY

### Biography

Youngest daughter of the Rt Rev George Moberly, she married (20 April 1876) Charles Awdry (1847-1912), whose brother William had earlier married her sister Emily.

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 26th 1876
- Letter from Aug 12 [1867]
- Letter from Novr 28th [1865?][[footnote:1]]
- Letter from [Summer 1864][[footnote:1]]
- Letter from Ascension Day [14 May 1863]
- Letter from [May ?1860s[[footnote:1]]
- Letter from [24 December ?1859[[footnote:2]]]
- Letter from [<i>c</i>. 24 December 1855]
- Letter from Friday [23 March 1855]
- Letter from June 9, 1854
- Letter from May 1854
- Letter from April 21st  [1854]
- Letter from July 16th [1852]
- Letter from Ascension Day [20 May], 1852.
- Letter from June 1st [1850s?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
